 if(switchlang!='') $(".cbnnr-text").html(switchlang);
}

cbnnr.show = function() {
    $('.cbnnr').css('display', 'block');
};

<td colspan="2" style="background:#F0F0D0; border:1px solid #E0C0B0; vertical-align:top; border-radius:10px; padding-left:1em; padding-right:1em; text-align:justify; width:65%;">
<div style="color: #262626; font-variant: small-caps; font-size: 23px; padding: 10px; padding-left: 10px;">Dulapaf teliz</div>
<div style="text-align: justify;"> 
<table width="100%">

<tbody><tr>
<td rowspan="4" style="vertical-align:top; padding-left:1em; padding-right:1em; text-align:justify; width:92%;">
<p><b>Muisca abdigalda</b> tiyir soka lospasa va <a href="/wiki/Muisca_sane" title="Muisca sane">Muisca</a> saneikeem koe istefo tawavo ke refe <a href="/wiki/Kolombia" title="Kolombia">Kolombia</a> sokasane abdi espanafa olgalicura. Balemoyi abdigaldaki tiyid : Muyquytá Zipazgo cosxo is Hunza Zacazgo cosxo is Iraca tumtaxo is Tundama tumtaxo voxis konako mivvexaxo.
</p>
<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Xanta">Xanta</h2></div>
<p>Mali lekeugal, Muisca va yerumara wali staba ksubeyed numen sina kadayad vangluyara ke yona doda. Ison vuwafa waldura gu vindara wal amidafa doda iku banafa fiste zo divatceyer, isen dofa vegedusa lagara dum lavakiraf bolk ta midura va ontinafa taya, isen sayakafa tanara ta likera va volnafa mikra dum Panche is Muzo, va lomantafa vangluyara tuadrayar. Bata kotcoba di tiyir tazukafa riga ke abdigalda.
</p><p>Lopof andik ta ardil is targuca is gaderopafi is skapafi roti va sint likeyed ise va sintafa doda lalevbenpluyud. Bata koboda va geja daskiyid. Voxen cenen okilik va gadera va staba is doda me mbi deswayad nume grustara ke dodeem is stabeem zo nendoyeyed. Opelon cenesik va intafa ardilafa tirka laumasiyir numaze va vamoefa gorara ronovaskiyir ise va kiewega loote mbi kserayar.
</p><p>Zipazgo cosxo moni 1450 awiyir, gadenon gan Saguamachica gejayasa va Panche mikra, aze kali 1541 lapteyer viele espanafa olgalicura va istexo ke refa Kolombia ceneson tenukeyer.
</p>
<figure class="mw-halign-left" typeof="mw:File/Thumb"><a href="/wiki/Iyeltak:Museo_del_oro,_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg" class="mw-file-description"><img src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/28/Museo_del_oro%2C_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg/250px-Museo_del_oro%2C_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg" decoding="async" width="250" height="375" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/28/Museo_del_oro%2C_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg/330px-Museo_del_oro%2C_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg 2x" data-file-width="1037" data-file-height="1555"></a><figcaption><div style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #5e5f62; font-size: 95%;">Muisca balumaks va lan mepilkomodan <i>Zipa</i> nafalik, re viden dene Tcila ke Moava koe Bogotá.</span></div></figcaption></figure>
<p>Cosxo ke Muisca abdigalda va kipi ke ontinafa gola ke Ronefa Rodega koe Kolombia modivatceyer, koe refa <a href="/wiki/KolombiaCundinamarcaWinka" title="KolombiaCundinamarcaWinka">Cundinamarca</a> winka isu <a href="/wiki/KolombiaBoyac%C3%A1Winka" title="KolombiaBoyacáWinka">Boyacá</a> isu <a href="/wiki/KolombiaSantanderWinka" title="KolombiaSantanderWinka">Santander</a>. Koe Cundinamarca, xopo tiyid azekexa ke <a href="/w/index.php?title=Bogot%C3%A1&action=edit&redlink=1" class="new" title="Bogotá (me tisu bu)">Bogotá</a> is <a href="/wiki/Ubat%C3%A9" title="Ubaté">Ubaté</a> is Pacho krant isu <a href="/wiki/Fusagasug%C3%A1" title="Fusagasugá">Fusagasugá</a> isu <a href="/wiki/Tenza" title="Tenza">Tenza</a> isu <a href="/wiki/C%C3%A1queza" title="Cáqueza">Cáqueza</a> ; koe Boyacá : <a href="/wiki/Tunja" title="Tunja">Tunja</a> is <a href="/wiki/Moniquir%C3%A1" title="Moniquirá">Moniquirá</a> is <a href="/wiki/Chiquinquir%C3%A1" title="Chiquinquirá">Chiquinquirá</a> is <a href="/wiki/Duitama" title="Duitama">Duitama</a> is <a href="/wiki/Villa_de_Leyva" title="Villa de Leyva">Villa de Leyva</a> is <a href="/wiki/Sogamoso" title="Sogamoso">Sogamoso</a> ; vagee Santander : wale <a href="/w/index.php?title=Su%C3%A1rez_(kuksa)&action=edit&redlink=1" class="new" title="Suárez (kuksa) (me tisu bu)">Suárez</a> kuksa isu <a href="/wiki/Chicamocha_(kuksa)" title="Chicamocha (kuksa)">Chicamocha</a>.
</p>
<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Grustara">Grustara</h2></div>
<p>Muisca abdigalda vas cosxo vas mon 47 000 km² ruldayar, valentu Chicamocha gola vage Páramo de Sumapaz gee Bogotá, is vataltu <a href="/wiki/V%C3%A9lez_(Santander)" title="Vélez (Santander)">Vélez</a> is <a href="/wiki/Zipac%C3%B3n" title="Zipacón">Zipacón</a> varon datca ke Ronefa Rodega tite azeka ke Meta golapa. Sanelia ke cosxo tiyir vas mon 1200000 irubasik ba artlakira ke espanik.
</p>

<div style="position:absolute; width:95%; left:40px; top:2px;"><h2 id="Wikipedia" style="margin:0; border-bottom:0; font-size:120%; font-weight:bold; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0 0 0 5px; font-family: calibri, ubuntu, arial;" class="mw-html-heading">Wikipedia</h2></div></div><table>

<td><div style="margin:0em 0em 0em 1em; padding-left:0px; padding-top:2px;">
<div style="width: 100%; float:right; padding-bottom: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
<div style="color: #262626; font-variant: small-caps; font-size: 23px; padding: 10px; padding-left: 20px; border-bottom: 1px dotted grey; margin-bottom: 10px;">Tokcoba tir Wikipedia ?</div>
<div style="padding-left: 12px; padding-right: 12px;"><div style="width:100%; text-align: justify;"><a href="/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia&action=edit&redlink=1" class="new" title="Wikipedia (me tisu bu)">Wikipedia</a> tir erava ta nuyon rovansana xadola numen kottan va cek ronovataler. Nope bata rieta, atoen detceeem tir valdigan tazukon gu teliz. Piskus webesik va sint ton doda gesiad, a gadesik, ise va lan vexeem tarkad. Webera zo someviroyar numen mialoduca icde cek zo kowazder. Cek batinde warzen tir romalsaven gire is rotamuzen verton gu <span class="plainlinks"><a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/deed.en">Creative Common BY-SA 3.0</a> sorta.</span></div></div>
</div></div>
</td></tr>



<tr>
<td><div style="margin:0em 0em 0em 0em; padding: 0px 10px 10px 0px;">

    Teliz mal Wikipedia.
    01/02/2025 : Daletoe loon 36 000 teliz !

    Va drumbaca den Wikipedia

    Tela kotavafa nuyafa xadola, bunena gan kottan !

    Bareaviel 30 lerdeaksat 2025


    Dene bata xadola 36 341 teliz ixam re zo suteyed.
    Va noeltafa atalera rorupel.
    Opeem Tawavopa Izvopa Yamba Suteroteem Kotava
    Dulapaf teliz

    Muisca abdigalda tiyir soka lospasa va Muisca saneikeem koe istefo tawavo ke refe Kolombia sokasane abdi espanafa olgalicura. Balemoyi abdigaldaki tiyid : Muyquytá Zipazgo cosxo is Hunza Zacazgo cosxo is Iraca tumtaxo is Tundama tumtaxo voxis konako mivvexaxo.

    Xanta

    Mali lekeugal, Muisca va yerumara wali staba ksubeyed numen sina kadayad vangluyara ke yona doda. Ison vuwafa waldura gu vindara wal amidafa doda iku banafa fiste zo divatceyer, isen dofa vegedusa lagara dum lavakiraf bolk ta midura va ontinafa taya, isen sayakafa tanara ta likera va volnafa mikra dum Panche is Muzo, va lomantafa vangluyara tuadrayar. Bata kotcoba di tiyir tazukafa riga ke abdigalda.

    Lopof andik ta ardil is targuca is gaderopafi is skapafi roti va sint likeyed ise va sintafa doda lalevbenpluyud. Bata koboda va geja daskiyid. Voxen cenen okilik va gadera va staba is doda me mbi deswayad nume grustara ke dodeem is stabeem zo nendoyeyed. Opelon cenesik va intafa ardilafa tirka laumasiyir numaze va vamoefa gorara ronovaskiyir ise va kiewega loote mbi kserayar.

    Zipazgo cosxo moni 1450 awiyir, gadenon gan Saguamachica gejayasa va Panche mikra, aze kali 1541 lapteyer viele espanafa olgalicura va istexo ke refa Kolombia ceneson tenukeyer.

    Cosxo ke Muisca abdigalda va kipi ke ontinafa gola ke Ronefa Rodega koe Kolombia modivatceyer, koe refa Cundinamarca winka isu Boyacá isu Santander. Koe Cundinamarca, xopo tiyid azekexa ke Bogotá is Ubaté is Pacho krant isu Fusagasugá isu Tenza isu Cáqueza ; koe Boyacá : Tunja is Moniquirá is Chiquinquirá is Duitama is Villa de Leyva is Sogamoso ; vagee Santander : wale Suárez kuksa isu Chicamocha.

    Grustara

    Muisca abdigalda vas cosxo vas mon 47 000 km² ruldayar, valentu Chicamocha gola vage Páramo de Sumapaz gee Bogotá, is vataltu Vélez is Zipacón varon datca ke Ronefa Rodega tite azeka ke Meta golapa. Sanelia ke cosxo tiyir vas mon 1200000 irubasik ba artlakira ke espanik.

    Wikipedia

    Tokcoba tir Wikipedia ?
    Wikipedia tir erava ta nuyon rovansana xadola numen kottan va cek ronovataler. Nope bata rieta, atoen detceeem tir valdigan tazukon gu teliz. Piskus webesik va sint ton doda gesiad, a gadesik, ise va lan vexeem tarkad. Webera zo someviroyar numen mialoduca icde cek zo kowazder. Cek batinde warzen tir romalsaven gire is rotamuzen verton gu Creative Common BY-SA 3.0 sorta.

Opeem Tawavopa Izvopa Yamba Suteroteem Kotava
Dulapaf teliz

Muisca abdigalda tiyir soka lospasa va Muisca saneikeem koe istefo tawavo ke refe Kolombia sokasane abdi espanafa olgalicura. Balemoyi abdigaldaki tiyid : Muyquytá Zipazgo cosxo is Hunza Zacazgo cosxo is Iraca tumtaxo is Tundama tumtaxo voxis konako mivvexaxo.

Xanta

Mali lekeugal, Muisca va yerumara wali staba ksubeyed numen sina kadayad vangluyara ke yona doda. Ison vuwafa waldura gu vindara wal amidafa doda iku banafa fiste zo divatceyer, isen dofa vegedusa lagara dum lavakiraf bolk ta midura va ontinafa taya, isen sayakafa tanara ta likera va volnafa mikra dum Panche is Muzo, va lomantafa vangluyara tuadrayar. Bata kotcoba di tiyir tazukafa riga ke abdigalda.

Lopof andik ta ardil is targuca is gaderopafi is skapafi roti va sint likeyed ise va sintafa doda lalevbenpluyud. Bata koboda va geja daskiyid. Voxen cenen okilik va gadera va staba is doda me mbi deswayad nume grustara ke dodeem is stabeem zo nendoyeyed. Opelon cenesik va intafa ardilafa tirka laumasiyir numaze va vamoefa gorara ronovaskiyir ise va kiewega loote mbi kserayar.

Zipazgo cosxo moni 1450 awiyir, gadenon gan Saguamachica gejayasa va Panche mikra, aze kali 1541 lapteyer viele espanafa olgalicura va istexo ke refa Kolombia ceneson tenukeyer.

Cosxo ke Muisca abdigalda va kipi ke ontinafa gola ke Ronefa Rodega koe Kolombia modivatceyer, koe refa Cundinamarca winka isu Boyacá isu Santander. Koe Cundinamarca, xopo tiyid azekexa ke Bogotá is Ubaté is Pacho krant isu Fusagasugá isu Tenza isu Cáqueza ; koe Boyacá : Tunja is Moniquirá is Chiquinquirá is Duitama is Villa de Leyva is Sogamoso ; vagee Santander : wale Suárez kuksa isu Chicamocha.

Grustara

Muisca abdigalda vas cosxo vas mon 47 000 km² ruldayar, valentu Chicamocha gola vage Páramo de Sumapaz gee Bogotá, is vataltu Vélez is Zipacón varon datca ke Ronefa Rodega tite azeka ke Meta golapa. Sanelia ke cosxo tiyir vas mon 1200000 irubasik ba artlakira ke espanik.

Muisca abdigalda tiyir soka lospasa va Muisca saneikeem koe istefo tawavo ke refe Kolombia sokasane abdi espanafa olgalicura. Balemoyi abdigaldaki tiyid : Muyquytá Zipazgo cosxo is Hunza Zacazgo cosxo is Iraca tumtaxo is Tundama tumtaxo voxis konako mivvexaxo.

Xanta
Mali lekeugal, Muisca va yerumara wali staba ksubeyed numen sina kadayad vangluyara ke yona doda. Ison vuwafa waldura gu vindara wal amidafa doda iku banafa fiste zo divatceyer, isen dofa vegedusa lagara dum lavakiraf bolk ta midura va ontinafa taya, isen sayakafa tanara ta likera va volnafa mikra dum Panche is Muzo, va lomantafa vangluyara tuadrayar. Bata kotcoba di tiyir tazukafa riga ke abdigalda.
Lopof andik ta ardil is targuca is gaderopafi is skapafi roti va sint likeyed ise va sintafa doda lalevbenpluyud. Bata koboda va geja daskiyid. Voxen cenen okilik va gadera va staba is doda me mbi deswayad nume grustara ke dodeem is stabeem zo nendoyeyed. Opelon cenesik va intafa ardilafa tirka laumasiyir numaze va vamoefa gorara ronovaskiyir ise va kiewega loote mbi kserayar.
Zipazgo cosxo moni 1450 awiyir, gadenon gan Saguamachica gejayasa va Panche mikra, aze kali 1541 lapteyer viele espanafa olgalicura va istexo ke refa Kolombia ceneson tenukeyer.

Muisca balumaks va lan mepilkomodan Zipa nafalik, re viden dene Tcila ke Moava koe Bogotá.
Cosxo ke Muisca abdigalda va kipi ke ontinafa gola ke Ronefa Rodega koe Kolombia modivatceyer, koe refa Cundinamarca winka isu Boyacá isu Santander. Koe Cundinamarca, xopo tiyid azekexa ke Bogotá is Ubaté is Pacho krant isu Fusagasugá isu Tenza isu Cáqueza ; koe Boyacá : Tunja is Moniquirá is Chiquinquirá is Duitama is Villa de Leyva is Sogamoso ; vagee Santander : wale Suárez kuksa isu Chicamocha.

Grustara
Muisca abdigalda vas cosxo vas mon 47 000 km² ruldayar, valentu Chicamocha gola vage Páramo de Sumapaz gee Bogotá, is vataltu Vélez is Zipacón varon datca ke Ronefa Rodega tite azeka ke Meta golapa. Sanelia ke cosxo tiyir vas mon 1200000 irubasik ba artlakira ke espanik.

Dulapaf teliz |  **Muisca abdigalda** tiyir soka lospasa va [Muisca](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muisca_sane "Muisca sane") saneikeem koe istefo tawavo ke refe [Kolombia](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kolombia "Kolombia") sokasane abdi espanafa olgalicura. Balemoyi abdigaldaki tiyid : Muyquytá Zipazgo cosxo is Hunza Zacazgo cosxo is Iraca tumtaxo is Tundama tumtaxo voxis konako mivvexaxo. 
## Xanta
Mali lekeugal, Muisca va yerumara wali staba ksubeyed numen sina kadayad vangluyara ke yona doda. Ison vuwafa waldura gu vindara wal amidafa doda iku banafa fiste zo divatceyer, isen dofa vegedusa lagara dum lavakiraf bolk ta midura va ontinafa taya, isen sayakafa tanara ta likera va volnafa mikra dum Panche is Muzo, va lomantafa vangluyara tuadrayar. Bata kotcoba di tiyir tazukafa riga ke abdigalda.  Lopof andik ta ardil is targuca is gaderopafi is skapafi roti va sint likeyed ise va sintafa doda lalevbenpluyud. Bata koboda va geja daskiyid. Voxen cenen okilik va gadera va staba is doda me mbi deswayad nume grustara ke dodeem is stabeem zo nendoyeyed. Opelon cenesik va intafa ardilafa tirka laumasiyir numaze va vamoefa gorara ronovaskiyir ise va kiewega loote mbi kserayar.  Zipazgo cosxo moni 1450 awiyir, gadenon gan Saguamachica gejayasa va Panche mikra, aze kali 1541 lapteyer viele espanafa olgalicura va istexo ke refa Kolombia ceneson tenukeyer.  [![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/28/Museo_del_oro%2C_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg/250px-Museo_del_oro%2C_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg)](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iyeltak:Museo_del_oro,_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg)Muisca balumaks va lan mepilkomodan _Zipa_ nafalik, re viden dene Tcila ke Moava koe Bogotá. Cosxo ke Muisca abdigalda va kipi ke ontinafa gola ke Ronefa Rodega koe Kolombia modivatceyer, koe refa [Cundinamarca](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/KolombiaCundinamarcaWinka "KolombiaCundinamarcaWinka") winka isu [Boyacá](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/KolombiaBoyac%C3%A1Winka "KolombiaBoyacáWinka") isu [Santander](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/KolombiaSantanderWinka "KolombiaSantanderWinka"). Koe Cundinamarca, xopo tiyid azekexa ke [Bogotá](https://avk.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Bogot%C3%A1&action=edit&redlink=1 "Bogotá \(me tisu bu\)") is [Ubaté](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ubat%C3%A9 "Ubaté") is Pacho krant isu [Fusagasugá](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fusagasug%C3%A1 "Fusagasugá") isu [Tenza](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tenza "Tenza") isu [Cáqueza](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/C%C3%A1queza "Cáqueza") ; koe Boyacá : [Tunja](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tunja "Tunja") is [Moniquirá](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Moniquir%C3%A1 "Moniquirá") is [Chiquinquirá](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chiquinquir%C3%A1 "Chiquinquirá") is [Duitama](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Duitama "Duitama") is [Villa de Leyva](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Villa_de_Leyva "Villa de Leyva") is [Sogamoso](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sogamoso "Sogamoso") ; vagee Santander : wale [Suárez](https://avk.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Su%C3%A1rez_\(kuksa\)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Suárez \(kuksa\) \(me tisu bu\)") kuksa isu [Chicamocha](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chicamocha_\(kuksa\) "Chicamocha \(kuksa\)"). 
## Grustara
Muisca abdigalda vas cosxo vas mon 47 000 km² ruldayar, valentu Chicamocha gola vage Páramo de Sumapaz gee Bogotá, is vataltu [Vélez](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/V%C3%A9lez_\(Santander\) "Vélez \(Santander\)") is [Zipacón](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zipac%C3%B3n "Zipacón") varon datca ke Ronefa Rodega tite azeka ke Meta golapa. Sanelia ke cosxo tiyir vas mon 1200000 irubasik ba artlakira ke espanik.  |  **Muisca abdigalda** |  **Zipazgo, Zacazgo (es)**

## Wikipedia
|  Tokcoba tir Wikipedia ? [Wikipedia](https://avk.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia&action=edit&redlink=1 "Wikipedia \(me tisu bu\)") tir erava ta nuyon rovansana xadola numen kottan va cek ronovataler. Nope bata rieta, atoen detceeem tir valdigan tazukon gu teliz. Piskus webesik va sint ton doda gesiad, a gadesik, ise va lan vexeem tarkad. Webera zo someviroyar numen mialoduca icde cek zo kowazder. Cek batinde warzen tir romalsaven gire is rotamuzen verton gu [Creative Common BY-SA 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/deed.en) sorta.

Dulapaf teliz |  **Muisca abdigalda** tiyir soka lospasa va Muisca⟨404⟩ saneikeem koe istefo tawavo ke refe Kolombia⟨405⟩ sokasane abdi espanafa olgalicura. Balemoyi abdigaldaki tiyid : Muyquytá Zipazgo cosxo is Hunza Zacazgo cosxo is Iraca tumtaxo is Tundama tumtaxo voxis konako mivvexaxo. 
## Xanta
Mali lekeugal, Muisca va yerumara wali staba ksubeyed numen sina kadayad vangluyara ke yona doda. Ison vuwafa waldura gu vindara wal amidafa doda iku banafa fiste zo divatceyer, isen dofa vegedusa lagara dum lavakiraf bolk ta midura va ontinafa taya, isen sayakafa tanara ta likera va volnafa mikra dum Panche is Muzo, va lomantafa vangluyara tuadrayar. Bata kotcoba di tiyir tazukafa riga ke abdigalda.  Lopof andik ta ardil is targuca is gaderopafi is skapafi roti va sint likeyed ise va sintafa doda lalevbenpluyud. Bata koboda va geja daskiyid. Voxen cenen okilik va gadera va staba is doda me mbi deswayad nume grustara ke dodeem is stabeem zo nendoyeyed. Opelon cenesik va intafa ardilafa tirka laumasiyir numaze va vamoefa gorara ronovaskiyir ise va kiewega loote mbi kserayar.  Zipazgo cosxo moni 1450 awiyir, gadenon gan Saguamachica gejayasa va Panche mikra, aze kali 1541 lapteyer viele espanafa olgalicura va istexo ke refa Kolombia ceneson tenukeyer.  ![⟨406⟩](https://avk.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iyeltak:Museo_del_oro,_Bogot%C3%A1_man_whose_eyes_and_mouth_have_been_made_from_double_strips.jpg)Muisca balumaks va lan mepilkomodan _Zipa_ nafalik, re viden dene Tcila ke Moava koe Bogotá. Cosxo ke Muisca abdigalda va kipi ke ontinafa gola ke Ronefa Rodega koe Kolombia modivatceyer, koe refa Cundinamarca⟨407⟩ winka isu Boyacá⟨408⟩ isu Santander⟨409⟩. Koe Cundinamarca, xopo tiyid azekexa ke Bogotá⟨410⟩ is Ubaté⟨411⟩ is Pacho krant isu Fusagasugá⟨412⟩ isu Tenza⟨413⟩ isu Cáqueza⟨414⟩ ; koe Boyacá : Tunja⟨415⟩ is Moniquirá⟨416⟩ is Chiquinquirá⟨417⟩ is Duitama⟨418⟩ is Villa de Leyva⟨419⟩ is Sogamoso⟨420⟩ ; vagee Santander : wale Suárez⟨421⟩&action=edit&redlink=1 "Suárez \(kuksa\) \(me tisu bu\)") kuksa isu Chicamocha⟨422⟩ "Chicamocha \(kuksa\)"). 
## Grustara
Muisca abdigalda vas cosxo vas mon 47 000 km² ruldayar, valentu Chicamocha gola vage Páramo de Sumapaz gee Bogotá, is vataltu Vélez⟨423⟩ "Vélez \(Santander\)") is Zipacón⟨424⟩ varon datca ke Ronefa Rodega tite azeka ke Meta golapa. Sanelia ke cosxo tiyir vas mon 1200000 irubasik ba artlakira ke espanik.  |  **Muisca abdigalda** |  **Zipazgo, Zacazgo (es)**

## Wikipedia
|  Tokcoba tir Wikipedia ? Wikipedia⟨438⟩ tir erava ta nuyon rovansana xadola numen kottan va cek ronovataler. Nope bata rieta, atoen detceeem tir valdigan tazukon gu teliz. Piskus webesik va sint ton doda gesiad, a gadesik, ise va lan vexeem tarkad. Webera zo someviroyar numen mialoduca icde cek zo kowazder.
